name: Cajun Shrimp Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add onion and sauté for approximately four minutes until softened.
2. Stir in garlic, thyme, cayenne pepper, black pepper, and basil. Cook at low heat for five more minutes.
3. Add tomatoes, sugar, green onions, chicken or shrimp stock, and cook the mixture over low heat for an hour, stirring occasionally.
4. In a separate pan, sauté shrimp in butter until three-quarters cooked (pink but not totally opaque). Drain excess oil before adding to the pasta sauce.
5. Mix the cooked shrimp with the sauce and add it back into the main pot.
6. Cook the pasta according to package instructions, then drain well.
7. Add the pasta and grated Parmesan cheese to the sauce, tossing until combined.
8. Serve hot. Serves 4-6 people.
